details.test: Task 1: Add three SMA RF attenuators under $40 to cart
Task 2: Choose cheaper of two attenuators and add 2 units to cart
Task 3: Add two different attenuators as short/long cable analogs
Task 4: Submit bulk quote request for SMA product
Task 5: Create 5G Lab Kit project list with multiple components
Task 6: Add an attenuator (bandpass filter analog) under $120 to cart
Task 7: Compare 3 attenuators and add 4 units of highest attenuation
Task 8: Fill cart with in-stock products from a single brand
Task 9: Estimate cheapest shipping and proceed to checkout
